prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-PBBSB15MM5I-BUN-20MM-BLCK-48PK Product Type: BUCKLE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: (48 Pack) ASR Outdoor Paracord Bracelet Buckle Set Black 20mm .75 Inch Description: Fix your old paracord bracelet with the ASR Outdoor Paracord Bracelet Buckle Set.

Each set comes with paracord bracelet buckles in standard black or assorted colors. Each buckle is .75" wide (20mm), making it perfect for smaller paracord bracelets. Just select your pack size and color choice from the drop down menu.

Other great uses for these buckles are camping and hiking gear repair, accessories, crafting and hobbies. Search Terms: 550 paracord buckle craft kit side release clips plastic buckle clasp replacement strap repair webbing backpack lanyard survival craft DIY 15mm 20mm black outdoor camping gear cordage accessories Features: - PARACORD BRACELET BUCKLES: Designed for making, fixing, upgrading or replacing paracord bracelet closures, these plastic side release buckles are a practical hardware essential for DIY survival bracelets, craft projects, lanyards and cordage accessories - MULTI FUNCTION: Snap release buckles are great for easy one-handed release and no accidental uncoupling - SIZE SPECIFICATION: Overall Width for Webbing is 3/4" Inch (20mm) - MULTIPURPOSE CRAFT HARDWARE: Use with paracord, webbing, rope, string, twine and other cordage materials for custom bracelets, backpack straps, pet collars, keychains, luggage tags, camp gear, hobby builds and everyday replacement projects - DURABLE LIGHTWEIGHT PLASTIC: Made from lightweight plastic for reliable everyday use in outdoor, craft and repair applications, these buckles are easy to keep in a workshop, garage, gear bag, tackle box, craft bin or emergency repair kit === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 80 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
